title: U.S. FTC seeks to block ICE's $13 bln takeover of Black Knight - Politico
text: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission is expected to challenge Intercontinental Exchange Inc's $13 billion deal for mortgage software company Black Knight , Politico reported on Monday citing three people with direct knowledge of the matter.

title: Intercontinental Exchange: The All-Weather Business Model
text: Intercontinental Exchange is a wonderful company at a fair price. Excellent financial performance; 50% operating margins, 50% recurring revenues and attractive cash returns in form of dividends and buybacks.

title: Why Intercontinental Exchange Is A Top Pick For Dividend Growth Investors
text: ICE is a financially stable dividend growth stock with a 5-year CAGR of 13.7%. The company offers a quarterly dividend of $0.42 and a low payout ratio of 29%.

title: Intercontinental (ICE) Q4 Earnings, Revenues Miss, Dividend Up
text: Intercontinental's (ICE) Q4 reflects revenue decline, attributable to soft Exchanges and Mortgage Technology segments. However, lower expenses were a respite.

title: IntercontinentalExchange (ICE) Lags Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: ICE (ICE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -0.79% and 0.38%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Intercontinental Exchange Stock To Edge Past The Expectations In Q4
text: The exchange surpassed the street expectations in the last quarter, with net revenues (total revenues minus transaction-based expenses) increasing by 1% y-o-y to $1.81 billion.
